title: Furious FPS (RED)
description: A Modpack That Drastically Improves Performance Using Resource Packs, Mods And Settings.
body:
# **FURIOUS FPS (RED)**
**is a lightweight, high-performance Minecraft modpack built specifically to boost your FPS. Whether you're playing on a low-end PC or just want a smoother experience, this modpack is for you.**
![The Logo Of The Modpack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9eb56c5874390442b828895d0eb0d359ef95b406.jpeg)
## Features:

_FPS Boosting Mods: Includes top performance-enhancing mods like Vulkan Mod, Lithium, and Modern Fix to maximize your frame rate._

_Utility Enhancements: Quality-of-life mods such as zoom and more—without bloating your game._

_Minimalist Approach: No unnecessary content. Just performance and essentials._

_Low-End Friendly: Designed to run even on modest hardware setups._

_Compatible & Customizable: Easily add or remove mods to suit your preferences._


_Whether you're PvPing, exploring, or building, Furious FPS (RED) ensures smooth gameplay every step of the way._

### NOTE : THIS IS MOSTLY COMPATIBLE WITH AMD CPUs And GPUs (GRAPHICS CARDS)
